summary: Classified the live PR inventory shard conservatively. No shared canonical exists for this inventory job, no close/merge/fix actions are allowed, and the open PRs should remain open for their own proof, review, maintainer, or follow-up tracks. One linked security-sensitive ref is quarantined only for central security handling.

actions.reason: Focused feature PR needs proof and review-finding resolution outside this close-only inventory shard.
